items.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
items.summary: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

items.title: Your Weekly Horoscope – ‘Free Will Astrology’ by Rob Brezsny
items.summary: Our partner Rob Brezsny, whose latest book is Astrology Is Real: Revelations from My Life as an Oracle, provides his weekly wisdom to enlighten our thinking and motivate our mood. Rob’s Free Will Astr…
